rationale: The cited paper is used in the Theoretical Implications section to position the present study within supplier-OEM governance research, not just in a generic citation list. The authors explicitly summarize Ghosh et al. (2006) as examining supplier control choices in customization and then state how their own findings add a contingency based on whether one or multiple downstream OEM partners are involved. This is a meaningful framing and contribution-linking use of the citation.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Ghosh et al. (2006) by broadening supplier governance logic from a supplier-OEM customization setting to alliance structures with multiple downstream partners. It argues that the optimal supplier control implications should be considered conditional on alliance structure (single vs. multiple OEM partners).
